title: 100pcs Christmas Artificial Red Mini Holly Berries,Artificial Red Berry Twig Stem Red Berry Fruits Picks Berry Winter Berries Bunch for Christmas Wreath Making Xmas Tree Decorations Supplies
features: 🌟 【Package Including】100 Pieces artificial berry stems,great Christmas decoration ornament for Xmas party decoration.

💝【Size】Each Berry Pick measures approx. 2.36 inches/6cm in length,the diameter of berry is 0.35 inches/ 0.9 cm.They all have wire,the berries branches can be bent randomly ,which can be easily used to make various decorations.
🌟【High Quality】The artificial red berries stems are made of high quality foam and wire, fine workmanship, durable material for long time use, lightweight and not easy to fade or break,reusable.
💝【Easy to Use】The artificial red berries stems can be bent for fixing,you can twist round garlands or branches on Christmas tree.A good ideal for gift decoration or holiday craft projects.

💝【Wide Application】The red berry branches can be used to decorate Christmas wreath garland, Christmas gift box, as Christmas cake topper and other christmas crafts,also ideal for present packing, DIY crafts, wedding, birthday and baby shower.
